# **\[Lead 2\]** {#[lead-2]}

## \[Big Idea\] {#[big-idea]}

There's only ONE reason your golf game is so inconsistent right now...

CONTACT.

Fact is... when you struggle to make consistently flush contact with the ball... 

It makes it IMPOSSIBLE to play good golf... let alone truly enjoy the game.

## \[Promises\] {#[promises]}

That's why, right now, I’m going to show you a simple SEQUENCE for turning your fat shots... thin shots... and even whiffs... into perfectly flushed shots...

That consistently hit the dead center of the clubface...

Fly 15 to 25 yards farther...

And instantly give you the confidence to play respectably well — even when you’re paired with low handicap ringers.

## \[False Solutions\] {#[false-solutions]}

I'll also show you why the typical advice for fixing your contact issues is DEAD WRONG...

Things like...

“Keep your head down”...

“Make sure your left arm is straight”...

"Shift your weight..."

Or "keep the clubface closed"...

All these things... are like putting bandaids on bullet wounds. 

## \[Tease Negative Hook\] {#[tease-negative-hook]}

Because they don't fix the REAL reason you or anyone else on the planet has contact issues. 

## \[False Solutions \+ Objections\] {#[false-solutions-+-objections]}

So it doesn’t matter if you spend a thousand hours on the range... pay a fortune in lessons... or watch weeks' worth of YouTube videos... 

## \[Tease Negative Hook\] {#[tease-negative-hook]-1}

Until you address this ONE root cause of poor contact... NOTHING will ever change.

## \[Testimonial \- Blind\] {#[testimonial---blind]}

\[SSTS-VSL-02: Testimonial: *“I’ve probably watched 100 hours of Youtube videos to learn how to make better contact. Today, after learning Martin’s simple sequence, I haven’t missed the center of the clubface yet.”* Show the student on camera first, then switch to him hitting a perfectly flush iron shot.\]

## \[Credibility / Tease Positive Hook\] {#[credibility-/-tease-positive-hook]}

This sequence was pioneered by a guy Tiger Woods considered to be one of the purest ball-strikers of all time.

## \[Objections\] {#[objections]}

And it doesn’t matter if you're brand new to the game...

Or you’ve been playing for 10, 20 or even 30 years and just can’t make consistent contact.

## \[Big Promise Positive\] {#[big-promise-positive]}

Because today I'm going to show you how ALL of your ball contact issues can be fixed PERMANENTLY with this ONE simple technique... after just 10 shots on the range.

## \[Credibility\] {#[credibility]}

I know that sounds like a wild claim, but stick with me here, and you'll see how it's been PROVEN in over 50,000 amateur golf lessons over 35 years...

## \[Ultimate Proof\] {#[ultimate-proof]}

Including LIVE, documented transformations in over 1,000 golf academies.

\[SSTS-VSL-01: B-roll of Martin’s golf schools\]

## \[Ultimate Proof Details\] {#[ultimate-proof-details]}

Where lifelong beginners went from barely being able to make contact with the ball... to hitting it perfectly flush.

And it didn't take them hours of practice...

It took just 10 shots or less.

## \[Introduction\] {#[introduction]}

Hi, my name is Martin Chuck . . .

## \[Tease Positive Hook\] {#[tease-positive-hook]}

And I'm going to show you this same 10-shot "simple sequence" right here in this brief video.

## \[Urgency\] {#[urgency]}

So I urge you to pay close attention...

## \[Big Promise Negative\] {#[big-promise-negative]}

Because once you see how this works... You'll NEVER miss hit the golf ball again.

## \[Dimensionalize \- Push Pull\] {#[dimensionalize---push-pull]}

And next time you step up to the ball... you’ll no longer have to HOPE that you make solid contact.

Instead, you’ll have the confidence and skill to flush it every single time...

## \[Anaphora \- Secondary Complaints\] {#[anaphora---secondary-complaints]}

No more overthinking... 

No more having to sneak out for a quick 9 when no one is watching... 

No more having to play by yourself because you’re embarrassed to play with your buddies.

## \[Tease Negative Hook\] {#[tease-negative-hook]-2}

Because this sequence works by correcting this ONE root cause.

And it's been proven to work, even for the most struggling golfers.

## \[Testimonial \- Blind\] {#[testimonial---blind]-1}

\[SSTS-VSL-03: Testimonial: *“This has to be the best way for beginner golfers to make flush contact. It’s easy. It works quickly. And so far I haven’t gone back to my old habits. My ball striking feels really good.”*  
Show him on camera first, then switch to him flushing a great shot with tracer.\]

## \[Works Even If\] {#[works-even-if]}

It's working for golfers who’ve never broken 100... 120...

## \[Works For The Lowly\] {#[works-for-the-lowly]}

And it's even working for those who’ve never stepped onto a REAL golf course in their life.

\[SSTS-VSL-04: Quick clips of before and after \- guys hitting fat shots, then on the other side hitting perfectly flush shots\]

## \[Affirmation \- General\] {#[affirmation---general]}

Most of these golfers were skeptical...

## \[Benefits\] {#[benefits]}

... until they felt the addictive feeling of striping a golf ball — and having the confidence to never hit another fat, thin, or shanked shot again... 

## \[Positive Hook Tease\] {#[positive-hook-tease]}

After using my "simple sequence"... these guys realized what you’re about to discover... 

That ALL you need to do... is go to the range... follow my 10-shot sequence to a “t”... 

##  \[Big Promise\] {#[big-promise]}

Then... in 10 shots or less... 

You’ll make the most insanely flush contact you’ve ever seen.

# **\[Background Story \- Both Leads Pick Up Here\]** {#[background-story---both-leads-pick-up-here]}

## \[Modest Introduction\] {#[modest-introduction]}

So, long before I coached Major winners like Darren Clarke and Mike Weir...

And before I was known as the “peoples’ coach” after hosting more than 1,000 golf academies... 

I discovered this breakthrough… 

I used to shag balls on the range for the great Moe Norman...

Who Tiger Woods claims is one of the purest ball strikers to ever play the game...

Moe would hit the ball so flush and consistently... 

I could literally sit in a chair out on the range... 

And every ball landed within FEET of the previous one... 

Experiencing that up close taught me a priceless lesson \- which I'm going to share with you here today.

You see...

As my career progressed... I ended up playing on the Canadian Tour...

And while grinding on Tour was great... 

What I'm MOST passionate about is working with amateur players as a PGA teaching professional...

But here's the thing...

# **\[The Real Problem \#1 \- You're Not Making Good Contact\]** {#[the-real-problem-#1---you're-not-making-good-contact]}

## 

## \[Story Relation\] {#[story-relation]}

That's where I started seeing amateurs making the same mistakes over and over... 

## \[Dimensionalized \+ Anaphoric \+ Primary Complaint\] {#[dimensionalized-+-anaphoric-+-primary-complaint]}

Players hitting behind the ball... causing fat shots...

Others hitting on top of the ball... causing thin shots...

And some of them couldn’t even get the ball into the air...

## \[Mistaken Belief\] {#[mistaken-belief]}

So while everyone wanted a lesson to gain distance... fix their slice... or just lower their scores... 

## \[Ah-Ha\] {#[ah-ha]}

What they didn’t realize...

## \[Big Idea \+ Negative Promise\] {#[big-idea-+-negative-promise]}

Is that without solid contact — you can NEVER fix any of those issues\!

## \[NLP Transition \- See-Look\] {#[nlp-transition---see-look]}

To see what I mean, just look at this... 

![][image2]  
\[SSTS-VSL-05: Graphic showing contact is the root of all swing issues.\]

## \[Single Word Mistaken Beliefs\] {#[single-word-mistaken-beliefs]}

Distance... slicing... lag... and the list goes on...

## \[Big Idea\] {#[big-idea]-1}

ALL of these issues require solid contact\!

## \[Anaphoric \+ Mistaken Belief\] {#[anaphoric-+-mistaken-belief]}

That means, it doesn't matter if you gain 15 miles per hour of swing speed...

\[SSTS-VSL-06: Show player with 100+ mph swing speed, hitting the ground behind the ball \- It would be great if this was a down the line shot that pans to the actual Ipad with Trackman data\]

## \[Anaphoric \+ Big Idea \+ False Solution\] {#[anaphoric-+-big-idea-+-false-solution]}

If you don't make solid contact, then that extra speed will go to WASTE...

## \[Anaphoric \+ Mistaken Belief\] {#[anaphoric-+-mistaken-belief]-1}

It means if you’re trying to fix your slice... It doesn't matter if you dial in an inside-out swing... 

\[SSTS-VSL-07: Show player with a perfect inside-out swing, hitting a slice with the ball tracer line showing ball flight\]

## \[Anaphoric \+ Big Idea \+False Solution\] {#[anaphoric-+-big-idea-+false-solution]}

If you don't make solid contact, then you'll STILL struggle with a slice...

## \[Anaphoric \+ Mistaken Belief\] {#[anaphoric-+-mistaken-belief]-2}

And it doesn't matter if you're doing everything imaginable to gain distance...

\[SSTS-VSL-08: Show someone taking massive practice swings and then hitting on top of the ball and completely duffing it\]

## \[Anaphoric \+ Big Idea \+ Consequence\] {#[anaphoric-+-big-idea-+-consequence]}

If you don’t make solid contact... then you'll actually LOSE yards off the tee.

## \[Ah-Ha\] {#[ah-ha]-1}

*Are you starting to see why most golfers NEVER get any better?*

## \[Big Idea\] {#[big-idea]-2}

Because if you're not making solid contact, then NOTHING else matters\!

![][image3]  
\[SSTS-VSL-09: Show diagram with CONTACT in the front lighting up. Could drop a crown on its head.\]

## \[Big Idea Reframe\] {#[big-idea-reframe]}

It's your ball contact that's responsible for improving ALL areas of your game.

That's why... the \#1 lesson I learned from Moe is...

## \[Big Idea Statement\] {#[big-idea-statement]}

Contact is everything in golf\!

## \[Rapport Building \+ You Can Do It Too \+ \] {#[rapport-building-+-you-can-do-it-too-+-]}

And look... Moe didn’t have a “picture-perfect” swing...

\[SSTS-VSL-10: show video of Moe swinging: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G-jYss\_2QQg](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G-jYss_2QQg)\] 

But his ball contact?

It was flawless.

Which is why he STILL landed every ball within feet of the previous shot.

## \[Transition \+ Big Idea \+ Tagline\] {#[transition-+-big-idea-+-tagline]}

Alright, so by now YOU KNOW contact is king...

## \[False Solutions\] {#[false-solutions]-1}

But the problem is, when I ask my students...

*“What have you TRIED doing... to make solid contact?...”*

...I always get the same answers.

They'll say...

*“I’ve watched a few Youtube videos on ball striking...”*

*... And I’ve been trying really hard to hit ball first...”*

Or *“I’ve put all my concentration on keeping my head down in the swing...”*

Or *“I focus all my attention on just hitting the ball.”*

And while all these things can help temporarily...

## \[Tease Negative Hook\] {#[tease-negative-hook]-3}

NONE of these swing thoughts actually address the ROOT cause of your inconsistent contact.

# **The Real Problem \#2 \- Why You Can't Make Flush Contact\]** {#the-real-problem-#2---why-you-can't-make-flush-contact]}

## \[Negative Hook \- General Proof\] {#[negative-hook---general-proof]}

Let me show you why...

\[SSTS-VSL-11: show an image/animation player at the top of the swing... have a circle (almost like a clock) around the body, representing the swing path... and have the ball on the ground in its normal position. The backswing should be one color and the down/up swing path should be represented in another color… make sure it’s obvious the ball is the bottom of the swing at address. This should NOT be a moving animation. We want to make the viewer SEE that the ball is at the bottom of the swing at address.\]

In this image, it looks like the ball is going to be contacted at the bottom of the swing, right? 

Actually... that’s WRONG. 

## \[Tease Negative Hook\] {#[tease-negative-hook]-4}

And THIS misconception is the REAL reason you can’t make solid contact...

## \[Negative Hook\] {#[negative-hook]}

Because the ball is absolutely NOT the bottom of the swing... 

That’s so important — I’m going to say it again: 

## 

## \[Negative Hook\] {#[negative-hook]-1}

The ONLY reason you — or any golfer on the planet — EVER makes poor contact... is because your ball is NOT supposed to be the bottom of your swing... period. 

## \[Negative Hook Defined\] {#[negative-hook-defined]}

So what does that mean?

Well as you probably know, in the golf swing, your body is rotating and relocating...

Or turning and shifting as some people say...

\[SSTS-VSL-12: show golfer turning and shifting weight backwards in the backswing (represented by one color) and then shifting their weight forward and swing up and through in the downswing and follow through (represented in another color)\]

And that means that the bottom of your swing at address...

... is NOT the bottom of your swing at impact. 

Look at this 3D animation... 

\[SSTS-VSL-13: Show animation of a golfer with the two colored circles around that represents the swing path. Then have a very clear line where the ball is at and arrows/words that say “bottom of the swing”\]

As you can see here, the bottom of your swing at address is the golf ball...

Which makes sense, right?

Okay... now watch what happens in slow motion as the golfer starts to move off the ball...

\[SSTS-VSL-14: Now show the same animation in motion as the golfer takes the backswing... the low point (bottom of the swing should shift backwards and behind the ball)\]

Can you see how the bottom of the swing is shifting in the backswing?

Now watch what happens as it moves through impact...

\[SSTS-VSL-15: Show slow motion animation downswing, weight shifting forward and we see the same circle and low point shifting in front of the ball. Make the Low Point or the bottom of the swing stand out and clear that the ball is behind the low point\]

The low point... or, in other words, the bottom of the swing... is shifting and moving in FRONT of the golf ball...

And that’s exactly why... unless you plan on swinging without moving any parts of your body except your arms — which I HIGHLY advise against...

## \[Negative Hook\] {#[negative-hook]-2}

The golf ball will NEVER be at the bottom of your swing. 

## \[False Solution \- Consequences\] {#[false-solution---consequences]}

And that also means that if right now... you’re *TRYING* to hit the ball at the bottom of your swing... 

You’ll always make poor contact... 

Like fat shots...

Thin shots...

And shanks. 

For example:

## \[Negative Hook \- Specific Proof\] {#[negative-hook---specific-proof]}

Here’s how trying to hit the ball at the bottom of the swing results in a fat shot... 

**![][image4]**  
\[SSTS-VSL-16: DO NOT USE ABOVE IMAGE: JUST AN EXAMPLE\! show a close up of the club hitting the ground and then the ball \- this very slow motion real shot to drive home the point, even seeing dirt fly and the contact totally off. The black line in the above image represents the LOW POINT (bottom of the swing) hitting the ground before the ball... we want to have that represented in our video of the fat contact\]

You see, if you’re intentionally — or unintentionally — focusing on HITTING the ball at the bottom of your swing...

Your club will hit the ground — the low point of your swing — BEFORE you make contact with the ball...

Which is going to make you come up short of the green...

Every. Single. Time.

Pretty bad, right?

Well, that’s just the beginning...

## \[Negative Hook \- Specific Proof\] {#[negative-hook---specific-proof]-1}

Here’s how trying to hit the ball at the bottom of the swing results in a thin shot... 

\[SSTS-VSL-17: show the animation with the player and circle around the swing, coming up and out of a shot, moving the low point to above the ground so they will hit the center of the ball\]

![][image5]  
\[SSTS-VSL-18: Show an up close slow motion video of someone thinning a shot\]

Which is why you’re hitting low warm burners that barely get off the ground...

And scream across the green leaving you in a worse position than where you started.

And while fat shots and thin shots are probably the two most common contact problems...

That’s not where it ends... 

## \[Negative Hook \- Specific Proof\] {#[negative-hook---specific-proof]-2}

Let’s look at what happens when you try to hit the ball at the bottom of your swing...

... and you have an open clubface at impact... 

\[SSTS-VSL-19: show an animation or slow motion shot of an open clubface making impact with the ground and then bouncing into the ball, striking it off the hosel \- causing a shanked shot\] 

Yes, that’s what it looks like when you shank one off the hosel...

Most of us know that horrible feeling... where you have to quickly look up to see if anyone saw it — before you hit your next shot. 

## \[Ah-Ha\] {#[ah-ha]-2}

Is it clear why trying to hit the ball at the bottom of your swing is NOT what you want?

I hope so...

Because until you get that... nothing else will ever matter. 

## \[Negative Hook Metaphor\] {#[negative-hook-metaphor]}

Think about it like the wheels on a car...

Without wheels... the car can’t go anywhere. 

It's the same in golf…

## 

## \[Big Idea\] {#[big-idea]-3}

Ball contact is the foundation of everything...

## \[Consequences\] {#[consequences]}

So unless you make great contact... 

You CAN’T go anywhere with your game.

You’ll remain stuck. 

# **\[Unique Mechanism \- Solution\]** {#[unique-mechanism---solution]}

## \[Positive Hook\] {#[positive-hook]}

That’s why learning to make contact at the **perfect strike point** in your swing is so important. 

## \[Positive Hook Defined Question \- What Is It?\] {#[positive-hook-defined-question---what-is-it?]}

So you’re probably wondering...

*“Well Martin, what IS the perfect strike point in my swing?”*

The answer is simple actually...

## \[Positive Hook Defined\] {#[positive-hook-defined]}

With your irons the perfect strike point looks like this:

\[SSTS-VSL-20: show animation or slow motion of the ball being struck and then the ground, demonstrating that the low point is after the ball \- This can stay on screen with cuts back and forth while he’s saying the line below. Really demonstrating that the ball is hit first, then the ground. And again the ground is the low point\]

As you can see here, your clubface hits the ball FIRST...

And THEN reaches the bottom of the swing...

Creating a perfect divot in front of where your ball was...

In other words... 

You’re able to fully USE your clubface angle to send the ball higher and farther in the air... 

\[SSTS-VSL-21: Show a slow motion shot where the ball is being hit first and then passing the low point past the ball... while tracking the club all the way to the follow through as the ball flies straight and far\]

![][image6]  
\[SSTS-VSL-22: This image demonstrates that the ball is hit, then the ground, then the bottom of the swing occurs \- really want to drive this home and tie it to really good b-roll of flush shots... and also the SOUND of flush contact with the irons. That’s a huge piece of making solid contact.\]

And guys, this is key...

Because when your clubface hits the ball on the WAY to the bottom of your swing... you’re able to hit the perfect strike point on your iron...

... without any grass, dirt, or obstructions between the club and the ball.

![][image7]  
\[SSTS-VSL-23: Again, please don’t use these images\! We need to recreate our own \- trying to show the perfect angle of attack, launch angle, and low point of swing is past the ball\]

## \[Big Idea Recap\] {#[big-idea-recap]}

The bottom line is: 

This kind of solid CONTACT... creates that perfectly flush sound...

## \[Big Idea Benefits \- Dimensionalized\] {#[big-idea-benefits---dimensionalized]}

As the ball screams off the clubface...

Launching 15 to 25 yards farther and straighter down the fairway — or at the green.

## \[Trigger Event \- Set Up\]  {#[trigger-event---set-up]}

And this is exactly why I spent the first two decades of my career... perfecting a swing sequence that makes it easy for amateur golfers to hit the **perfect strike point...**

Because as long as you're using this sequence...

You'll make flush contact... over and over... EVEN with an imperfect swing\!

\[SSTS-VSL-24: Show a golfer with an imperfect swing, taking a flush, perfect divot and the ball flying high and straight with an iron\]

... without having to think about the takeaway... 

without having to think about clubface angle...

## \[Ease of use \+ Attainability \+ Inject Hope\] {#[ease-of-use-+-attainability-+-inject-hope]}

It’s so simple… if you can chop wood, then you can do the No-Turn Backswing… 

… and it automatically gets your swing on the correct path for perfect contact...

… dials in your angle of attack... 

## \[Negative Promise \- Negative Hook\]  {#[negative-promise---negative-hook]}

… and gets you to finally STOP focusing on *HITTING the ball* at the bottom of the swing*.*

## \[Drill Promises\] {#[drill-promises]}

That’s going to happen naturally when you do this part of the sequence. 

Because now that you have the club attacking the ball from the perfect angle...

## \[NLP Benefit Turn \- Push Pull\] {#[nlp-benefit-turn---push-pull]}

And you won't be focusing on “hitting the ball”...

You’ll start collecting the ball on the way down...

... and nipping the ground at the EXACT low point needed for flush contact. 

## \[Validation Of Skepticism\] {#[validation-of-skepticism]}

... which might seem impossible at first...

But once this part of the sequence gets your club hitting the ball at the perfect strike point...

EVERYTHING will fall into place...

And you’ll experience that highly addictive feeling of puring the ball in the center of the clubface. 

## \[Future Pacing \- Journey\] {#[future-pacing---journey]}

Think about it... 

How good is it going to feel if you’ve been consistently making horrible contact...

Slamming your club into the ground before the ball...

Or thinning low worm burners barely reaching the fairway...

To now... finally flushing it...

... watching your ball sail higher and farther than you ever hit it before.

It’s the best feeling in golf...

And you’re about to be able to do that on command.

## \[Recap Big Promise Positive\] {#[recap-big-promise-positive]}

You’ll have the confidence to hit the perfect strike point every time...

And you’ll be ready to take your newly found pure contact out onto the course...

# **\[Lead 1 \- Proven Formula\]** {#[lead-1---proven-formula]}

## \[Hook\] {#[hook]}

Here’s a FACT: contact is *everything* in golf...

And if you struggle to make consistently flush contact with the ball... you’ll NEVER play good golf... or be able to TRULY enjoy this great game.

But here’s the good news... it doesn’t matter whether you just picked up a club for the first time...

Or you’ve been playing for 10, 20 or even 30 years and just can’t make consistent contact...

All your contact issues — literally ALL of them — can be fixed PERMANENTLY in just 10 shots on the range. 

Hi, my name is Martin Chuck . . .

## \[Tease/Big Promise\] {#[tease/big-promise]}

And right here, right now I’m going to teach you a simple sequence for turning your fat shots...

... thin shots... and even whiffs... into perfectly flushed shots...

That consistently hit the dead center of the clubface...

Fly 15 to 25 yards farther... 

And instantly give you the confidence to play respectably well — even when you’re paired with low handicap ringers... 

Time and time again.   

So listen . . .

## 

## \[Big Promise Objection\] {#[big-promise-objection]}

I know that’s a big promise . . .

And if you’re thinking “but Martin, I’ve tried everything to hit the ball consistently” —  I understand . . .

But let me ask you a question...

How many ball striking techniques have you tried... were pioneered by a guy Tiger Woods considered to be one of the purest ball-strikers of all time...?

I’d be willing to bet the answer is ZERO... 

## \[Credibility \+ Proof\] {#[credibility-+-proof]}

Beyond that, how many of the ball striking techniques you’ve tried were *proven* — not only in 50,000 lessons given to amateur golfers over 35 years... 

... but also proven in LIVE, documented transformations in over 1,000 novice golf academies... 

\[SSTS-VSL-01: B-roll of Martin’s golf schools  \- Ask Brixton for the Martin folder that has ALL his golf academy footage\]

Where lifelong beginners went from barely being able to make contact with the ball... to hitting it perfectly flush — in 10 shots or less. 

Again... pretty sure it’s ZERO. 

That means what you’re about to discover is unlike anything you’ve *ever* been taught before... 

Because my 10-shot “*simple strike sequence*” gives you perfect, flush contact... 

... so you have the accuracy and consistency to shoot lower scores...

Even if you’ve struggled to hit the ball flush your entire life.

And that’s why I urge you to give me your undivided attention for the next few minutes...

So I can walk you through this 10-shot sequence — right here in this brief video... 

## \[Benefit\] {#[benefit]}

Because I’m committed to making sure — that after today — you NEVER miss the golf ball again... 

So next time you step up to the ball... you no longer have to HOPE that you make solid contact.

Instead, you’ll have the confidence and skill to flush it every single time...

No more overthinking... 

No more having to sneak out for a quick 9 when no one is watching... 

No more having to play by yourself because you’re embarrassed to play with your buddies... 

Bottom line: you’re about to discover the real root cause of your inconsistent contact — and exactly what it takes to fix it forever... 

## \[What It’s Not\] {#[what-it’s-not]}

Because the truth is, everything you’ve been told about how to fix your contact issues — is DEAD WRONG... 

Things like... 

“Keep your head down”...

“Make sure your left arm is straight”... 

“Shift your weight...”

Or “keep the clubface closed”...

All these things... are like putting bandaids on bullet wounds. 

Because they don't fix the REAL reason you or anyone else on the planet has contact issues... 

## \[Tease Real Root Cause\] {#[tease-real-root-cause]}

And unless you address this one root cause... 

## \[Other Methods Don’t Work\] {#[other-methods-don’t-work]}

It doesn’t matter if you spend a thousand hours on the range... pay a fortune in lessons... or watch weeks' worth of YouTube videos... 

NOTHING will ever change. 

Just look at these players who’ve tried everything you’ve probably seen in magazines, websites and YouTube...  

## \[Testimonial \- Blind\] {#[testimonial---blind]-2}

\[SSTS-VSL-02: Testimonial: *“I’ve probably watched 100 hours of Youtube videos to learn how to make better contact. Today, after learning Martin’s simple sequence, I haven’t missed the center of the clubface yet.”* Show the student on camera first, then switch to him hitting a perfectly flush iron shot.\]

\[SSTS-VSL-03: Testimonial: *“This has to be the best way for beginner golfers to make flush contact. It’s easy. It works quickly. And so far I haven’t gone back to my old habits. My ball striking feels really good.”*  
Same as above. Show him on camera first, then switch to him flushing a great shot with tracer.\]

## \[Proof\] {#[proof]}

And if it were just these two players, it would be one thing... 

But this 10-shot “simple strike sequence” works for even the most struggling golfers... 

\[SSTS-VSL-04: Quick clips of before and after \- guys hitting fat shots, then on the other side hitting perfectly flush shots\]

Including guys who’ve never broken 100... 120... and even those who’ve never stepped onto a REAL golf course in their life. 

And these golfers ALL had similar doubts... 

... until they felt the addictive feeling of striping a golf ball — and having the confidence to never hit another fat, thin, or shanked shot again. 

After completing my 10-shot sequence... these guys realized what you’re about to discover... 

That ALL you need to do is... go to the range... follow my “simple strike sequence” to a “t”... 

Then... in 10 shots or less... 

You’ll make the most insanely flush contact you’ve ever seen.

## \[Focus\] {#[focus]}

So there’s only one thing to do right now... 

Turn off all distractions... silence all notifications... and give me your undivided attention for the next several minutes... 

Because I promise you... 

## \[Benefits\] {#[benefits]-2}

Your search for a solution to fix your contact issues... is OVER. 

And the beginning of your better golf journey... 

As a golfer who can pure your irons with laser-like control...

Sending every shot 15 to 25 yards farther than you're used to...

And find the center of the fairway and greens more than you've ever imagined...

It all begins right now.

# **\[Lead 3\]** {#[lead-3]}

Whether that’s fat shots, thin shots, shanks, or anything else…

Then you need to first understand the real reason you struggle with CONTACT. 

And you may have seen me talking about this over last two years…   
But what you WON’T find in any of my videos or things I’ve published in Golf Digest… 

Are the TWO ball-striking drills I’ve developed while working with over 100,000 amateurs in person.
